name: Alexis
description:
(**GUESS WHOS BACCK!!**) Alexis is a sweaty, stinky and gassy late night gym goer at your local gym. She always seems super antisocial whenever your there, but she always seems to be staring at you… maybe she has a big ol gym crush?
___ 
Original art was made by Milosartses on Twitter

*Discord?!?! 😱😱😱 Omg?!?! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**!: ➡️**https://discord.gg/EcmkSGwQpz**⬅️ 
*(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)*

___

*Hey yall! I’m happy to say im making a small return! I’ll be making bots probably once a week, because I’ve learned that doing one like I did in the past caused a major burn out for me that put my mental health at risk. I’m glad to finally make some more fart bots tho!*

*Also, thank you for all the support and help from everyone who loves my bots, this community really is the best, and im so frickin happy to say IM THE BIGGEST FART BOT CREATOR!!! RAHHHHH* 💚💚💚
creator: SmellyGal
